category_sources: source_facts.description says it is for your terminal window; official GitHub README describes hr as a horizontal ruler for your terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hr; official GitHub repository and README title use “hr”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents setup and usage and links to the project wiki for more information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/LuRsT/hr; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says it is a terminal ruler, documents command usage, and repository topics include shell, cli, and utils.
